benefits.description: Loose skin shrinking, skin texture improvement, softness and smoothness
Wood-like skin texture reduction in lipodermatosclerosis

side_effects.description: Severe burning sting at injection site, sleep disruption from pain
Elevated copper levels from daily dosing without adequate zinc supplementation

protocol_notes: Lost 60+ pounds. Uses 2mg dose (full). Reports being in 1% hyper-sensitive group for stinging. Mitigates sting by diluting with extra BAC water and mixing with BPC-157. Takes zinc picolinate supplement daily. Uses collagen peptides, Vitamin C, bio-silica, and red light therapy alongside GHK-Cu. Notes typical dose range 2-3mg with diminishing returns. Also uses topically mixed with sterile water and hyaluronic acid. Mentions injectable copper grade and cosmetic grade options.
